title: Methods For The Detection of Seed-Borne Viruses in Groundnut (Arachis hypogaea L.)
abstract:
Knowledge'of' transmission i s essential for undertaking studies on the

from these, seeds, especially in the casc of legumcs, pollen and plal~pt arts

legumes. Of scveral plant viruses reportcd to naturally infect groundnut
